turns.content:
You are the subagent **hm-executor** (implementation specialist, executor for the hm-* lineage). You are being delegated by L0 `hm-orchestrator` (parent session `ses-p58-73-parent`). You must do as this prompt instructed and fulfill your task within boundaries and without any deviation. Run gatekeeping before reporting COMPLETED. If verification fails, return FAILED with evidence — do NOT claim COMPLETED without evidence.

## DELEGATION CONTEXT
- **Path type:** coordinated-path (multi-commit, single file, sequential)
- **Dispatch ID:** D3
- **Wave:** 2C (S3 — pre-send validation + non-blocking send + auto-poll callback + comment fix)
- **Task group:** W2-T1 of `.planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md` (S3 portion)
- **Phase:** 58 gap-fix extension
- **Working directory:** `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private`
- **Branch:** `feature/harness-implementation`
- **Expected atomic commits:** 3 (sequential — I13, I14, I15)
- **Max retry:** 1

## TASK
Close S3 symptom: orchestrator main stream ends early when no more work; does NOT block. WaiterModel expects main stream to STAY OPEN while delegations in flight. `delegate-task` should be non-blocking + open stream; native `task` is blocking + queues. Evidence: `src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:202, 204, 244` (where `await sendPromptAsync` blocks).

This wave adds pre-send validation, converts blocking `await sendPromptAsync` to fire-and-forget `void sendPromptAsync`, wires an auto-poll callback so the parent stream stays open while delegations are in flight, and fixes a code comment.

## READ FIRST (skim then targeted reads)
- `.planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md` (esp. Wave 2C section, S3 in `<tasks>`)
- `.planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-CONTEXT.md` (D-58-13..17)
- `.planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-SPEC.md` (REQ-58-09 S3)
- `src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts` (evidence lines 202, 204, 244 — the blocking `await sendPromptAsync`)
- `src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts` (downstream consumer)
- `tests/scripts/tmux/73-stream-stays-open.bats` (BATS 73 — currently RED per commit `7d216809`)

## CURRENT STATE (L0-verified)
- 16/29 atomic commits DONE on `feature/harness-implementation`
- Latest commits: `053ab20a` `502fa73c` `38d10dbb` `25869ea2` `d274d5fa` (D2 Wave 2B complete)
- BATS 71 GREEN, BATS 72 GREEN, BATS 62-67 GREEN, BATS 73 RED (must turn GREEN in this wave), BATS 74 RED (Wave 2D)
- 27-tool-key preserved
- Working tree DIRTY: ~60 unstaged files (runtime state + planning drift) — DO NOT include in your commits

## SCOPE BOUNDARIES (HARD LIMITS)
- **MAY modify (src):** `src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts` ONLY
- **MAY modify (test):** `tests/scripts/tmux/73-stream-stays-open.bats` ONLY if RED is due to test-side expectation gap
- **MUST NOT modify:** any other src/test file
- **MUST NOT create:** new files
- **MUST NOT introduce:** `any` types, `// @ts-ignore`, `// @ts-expect-error`
- **MUST NOT regress:** BATS 71, 72, 62-67
- **MUST NOT regress:** 27-tool-key invariant
- **MUST NOT regress:** BATS 74 (still RED — that's Wave 2D)

## EXPECTED ATOMIC COMMITS (3 sequential, in this order)
1. **I13**: Add pre-send validation in `manager-runtime.ts` `dispatch()` — validate required fields, queue-key format, parent session id, etc. BEFORE `sendPromptAsync`
2. **I14**: Convert blocking `await sendPromptAsync` to fire-and-forget `void sendPromptAsync` at evidence lines 202, 204, 244 — the parent stream must stay open
3. **I15**: Wire auto-poll callback + fix the stale code comment near the dispatch lifecycle (the comment currently says something inaccurate post-I14)

## SUCCESS METRICS
1. BATS 73 exits 0 (green) — `bash tests/scripts/tmux/73-stream-stays-open.bats`
2. BATS 71, 72, 62-67 still GREEN
3. BATS 74 still RED
4. `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
5. `npm test` clean EXCEPT pre-existing P55 BATS 61 warning
6. 27-tool-key preserved
7. 3 atomic commits on `feature/harness-implementation` with message format: `fix(58): <what> — <why>` or `feat(58): <what> — <why>`
8. All commit hashes recorded
9. File:line evidence: pre-send validation site; non-blocking send site; auto-poll callback site; comment fix site

## ATOMIC COMMIT DISCIPLINE
- 1 logical change = 1 commit. Commit AFTER each of I13, I14, I15.
- Run `git status` BEFORE each staging to confirm only `src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts` (and optionally BATS 73) are modified.
- Run `npx tsc --noEmit` BEFORE each commit. Run `bash tests/scripts/tmux/73-stream-stays-open.bats` BEFORE final commit.
- Commit message format: `fix(58): <what> — <why>` (no emoji)
- Do NOT amend prior commits.
- Do NOT push.
- Do NOT include dirty `.hivemind/session-tracker/*.json` or `.planning/STATE.md` in any commit.

## HARD FAIL TRIGGERS
- BATS 71, 72, 62-67 regression
- 27-tool-key drift
- `any` introduction
- Need to modify a file outside the allowed list
- Need to create a new file
- Accidentally turning BATS 74 green (that's Wave 2D's job)

## OUTPUT FORMAT
```
[status]: COMPLETED | FAILED | BLOCKED
[commit_hashes]: <comma-separated 3 hashes for I13-I15>
[bats_73]: <exit_code> <pass/fail>
[bats_71_72_62_67_regression]: <all_8_pass | regression_summary>
[bats_74]: <still_RED | accidentally_green_summary>
[tsc]: <clean | error_summary>
[npm_test]: <pass | fail_summary>
[files_modified]: <comma-separated paths>
[evidence]:
  - src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:<line>: <pre-send validation — show snippet>
  - src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:<line>: <fire-and-forget void sendPromptAsync — was line 202, 204, 244>
  - src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:<line>: <auto-poll callback wiring>
  - src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:<line>: <comment fix — show before/after>
  - tests/scripts/tmux/73-stream-stays-open.bats:<line>: <assertion that now passes>
[27_tool_key_count]: <number>
[notes]: <anything L0 should know>
[blocker]: <only if status=BLOCKED>
```

## AFTER YOUR RETURN
L0 will: verify commits; re-run BATS 73 + 71 + 72 + 62-67 + 74; quality gate triad; proceed to Dispatch 4 (Wave 2D, S4 child-event-stream).

Begin execution. Be concise.
